---
title: "Marine Genomics Workshop 1"
author: "Darius HUISMAN"
date: "2026-07-08"
output: 
 html_document:
    code_folding: show
    collapse: no
    df_print: paged
    fig_caption: yes
    fig_height: 6
    fig_width: 10
    highlight: textmate
    theme: spacelab
    toc: yes
    toc_float: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---
